title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART G. SUBSTANCE ABUSE CONDITIONAL RELEASE

§574.61. Short title

            This Subpart may be referred to and may be cited as the "Substance Abuse Conditional Release Act".

            Acts 2013, No. 389, §2.
doc_text:
SUBPART G.  SUBSTANCE ABUSE CONDITIONAL RELEASE
§574.61.  Short title
This Subpart may be referred to and may be cited as the "Substance Abuse
Conditional Release Act".
Acts 2013, No. 389, §2.
